title: Tapping for Millionaire Habits
subtitle: A tapping practice for seeing the wealthy habits you already practise daily
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 56 of a 12-week money program. The script works with the belief that millionaire habits are distant or out of reach, and reframes toward recognition that thoughtful spending, steady saving, and calm daily money care are already in place.
sourceNotes: The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), in use since the mid-1990s. The script is adapted from Day 56 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use when millionaire-level wealth feels like it belongs to someone else, or when you want to anchor the daily habits that build real wealth as things you already do.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 56 of a 12-week money program. The script addresses the belief that millionaire habits are out of reach or belong in a different future. The reframe names the habits already in place: thoughtful spending, consistent saving, calm daily money care.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop
Even though I once thought millionaire habits were out of reach, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I doubted I could live like that now, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though it felt like a far-off dream, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round
Eyebrow: I see how many millionaire habits I already practise.
Side of eye: Thoughtful spending and smart investing.
Under eye: Consistent saving and planning.
Under nose: Calm daily money care.
Chin: I feel proud of these steady changes.
Collarbone: I know they build real wealth.
Under arm: I love seeing myself as a natural millionaire.
Top of head: I celebrate living these habits today.
Reframe to positive
Eyebrow: I already live with millionaire discipline and joy.
Side of eye: I keep strengthening these habits each day.
Under eye: I see myself as wealthy and capable.
Under nose: I trust my choices to create real abundance.
Chin: I love how natural these habits now feel.
Collarbone: I build lasting wealth one calm action at a time.
Under arm: I celebrate the millionaire lifestyle I live daily.
Top of head: I embody wealth in every small choice.
Tap each round three times, then move to the reframe and tap that three times.
Where this practice comes from
The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), developed in the mid-1990s. The script is adapted from Day 56 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
